data.content: Approved implementation review. The latest artifact on worktree-foolery-160c (commit 79d35ab22e0e5be7de7c80bc50dba315b552638a) now uses opencode serve --port 0 --print-logs as the interactive/headless entrypoint via OpenCodeHttpSession, with URL discovery from stdout, shared runtime event injection, follow-up turn delivery, close-input scheduling, watchdog timeout handling, and take-loop/claimed-step wiring through the common session runtime. Verified against the installed CLI that opencode serve exists and that a live server start prints the listening URL on stdout. Gates passed in the implementation worktree: bun run test (227 files, 2538 tests passed), bunx tsc --noEmit, and bun run build. bun run lint exited 0 with one existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx unrelated to this change.
